name: Our-services list with filters
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete 'Our Services' listing page of a UAE ministry website as a single standalone HTML page. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; breadcrumb navigation; a page-title banner; a left sidebar with service categories and filter groups of checkboxes; a search field for services; a results list of services (title, description, tags) showing the result count; pagination; and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template
